category_sources: source_facts.description says it manages temporary security credentials from IAM Roles Anywhere; official AWS docs describe the credential helper for IAM Roles Anywhere credentials.
display-name: AWS IAM Roles Anywhere Credential Helper
display_name_sources: official GitHub README heading is AWS IAM Roles Anywhere Credential Helper; source_facts.name is rolesanywhere-credential-helper.
docs_sources: official AWS documentation has a dedicated Credential Helper page; official GitHub README provides command and build documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/aws/rolesanywhere-credential-helper, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names IAM Roles Anywhere temporary credentials; official AWS docs describe X.509 certificate based credential helper usage.
